text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the race, Gold Ship prepares to
spread her wings and show off her legendary
butterfly stroke. Too bad the Hopeful Stakes
takes place on land!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, the Pacific Ocean is waiting for her. Fly
toward the finish line with enough momentum to
clear an ocean trench, Gold Ship!
